persona.description: User who knows the product and has a specific question

transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling support. How can I help you today?
User: Hi, I need to update my payment method.
Agent: I can help with that. Can you verify your account email?
User: Sure, it's user@example.com.
Agent: Thank you. I've located your account. Would you like to add a new card or update an existing one?
User: Add a new one please.
Agent: I'll transfer you to our secure payment update flow now. One moment.
